The '''3rd age pickaxe''' is a piece of [[3rd age equipment]]. It requires 65 [[Attack]] to wield and 61 [[Mining]] to use and shares the same mining speed and [[special attack]] as a [[dragon pickaxe]].

It is a possible reward from [[Clue scroll (master)|master]] [[Treasure Trails]] and cannot be made through any skills.  Despite being listed on the [[Grand Exchange]] for the maximum amount of coins, it is typically traded amongst players for tremendously more than that.

{{Costume storage|treasure chest|tier=master}}
